source_name: State and territory government net debt (Treasury budget papers, scaffold)
notes: Manual scaffolded summary of state and territory government general-government-sector net debt. All eight jurisdiction rows are present with named Treasury budget-paper URLs, but values remain null and rows are marked Partial coverage because each state/territory's specific dollar figure must be hand-keyed from a Budget Paper / Statement PDF that this sandbox cannot fetch. The 'Acceptable fail-closed outcome' from the spec applies: the scaffold ships with named sources and explicit 'value pending verification' caveats; no fabricated values are added. No national aggregate is published because the rows are not safe to sum (definitions, accounting boundaries and jurisdiction scope differ; ACT and NT in particular have non-comparable scope to mainland states).
source_rights: CC BY 4.0 where stated by publisher; each state/territory Treasury copyright applies
citation: State and territory budget papers (NSW Budget Paper No. 1; VIC Statement of Finances; QLD Budget Paper No. 2; WA Budget Paper No. 3; SA Budget Statement; TAS Budget Paper No. 1; ACT Budget Outlook; NT Budget Paper 2).

rows.row_label: Pending verification from named Budget Paper No. 1 / Budget Statement

rows.comparability_note: SA state budget page returned HTTP 403 to scripted access from this sandbox; figure must be hand-keyed from the Budget Statement (PDF) opened in a browser. Value left null pending verification.

rows.row_label: Pending verification from named Budget Paper No. 1
rows.comparability_note: TAS Treasury page returned HTTP 503 to scripted access from this sandbox; figure must be hand-keyed from Budget Paper No. 1 (PDF) opened in a browser. Value left null pending verification.

rows.debt_concept: General government sector net debt (ACT publishes a unified general government sector but boundary differs from larger jurisdictions)
rows.row_label: Pending verification from named Budget Outlook
rows.comparability_note: ACT Treasury page returned HTTP 403 to scripted access from this sandbox. ACT also has a smaller jurisdictional scope than mainland states, so its net-debt figure is not directly comparable to NSW/VIC/QLD/WA in absolute dollar terms. Hand-key from Budget Outlook (PDF) and preserve the scope-difference caveat. Value left null pending verification.

rows.row_label: Pending verification from named Budget Paper 2
rows.comparability_note: NT Treasury page returned HTTP 403 to scripted access from this sandbox; figure must be hand-keyed from Budget Paper 2 (PDF) opened in a browser. NT has a much smaller revenue base than mainland states; absolute dollar net debt is not directly comparable. Value left null pending verification.

fields.national_aggregate_note: No national aggregate is published. State and territory general-government-sector net debt rows are not safe to sum: definitions vary (some jurisdictions exclude or include certain entities differently), accounting boundaries differ, ACT and NT have much smaller jurisdictional scope, and rounding/period choices differ across budget papers. A summed 'Australian state and territory net debt' headline would mislead, and Commonwealth AOFM debt is a separate measure.
fields.comparability_basis: Preferred concept is general government sector net debt as published in each state/territory's latest Budget Paper / Statement (typically 30 June 2026 estimate from the 2025-26 budget cycle). Rows that cannot be loaded with the preferred concept must be marked Partial coverage with the exact concept used.
fields.audit_method: Each Treasury budget homepage was probed for HTTP reachability from the build environment. Reachable (HTTP 200): NSW, VIC, QLD, WA budget homepages. Blocked from sandbox (HTTP 403/503): SA, TAS, ACT, NT budget homepages. In all eight cases, the actual net-debt figure lives in a Budget Paper PDF that requires browser access to verify, so values remain null in this scaffold.
